q.en: Who first came up with the idea of giving the Statue of Liberty as a gift to the United States?
q.zh: 谁最先提出将自由女神像作为礼物赠予美国？

options.en: Auguste Bartholdi, the sculptor according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 雕塑家奥古斯特·巴托尔迪（按书中另一种说法）
工程师古斯塔夫·埃菲尔

options.en: Edouard de Laboulaye, a French historian
options.zh: 法国历史学家爱德华·德·拉布拉耶

explain.en: The book says: 'Edouard de Laboulaye, a French historian, admired the United States. In 1865... Mr. Laboulaye told Mr. Bartholdi that he wanted to give a gift of friendship to the United States. The gift was the Statue of Liberty.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：'法国历史学家爱德华·德·拉布拉耶敬仰美国。1865年……拉布拉耶先生告诉巴托尔迪，他想把友谊之礼送给美国。这份礼物就是自由女神像。'

q.en: About how much does the Statue of Liberty weigh?
q.zh: 自由女神像大约有多重？

options.en: About 450,000 pounds, or as much as 115 cars
About 1,000 pounds according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 约1,000磅（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book says: 'It weighs about 450,000 pounds, or as much as 115 cars.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：'它重约450,000磅，相当于115辆汽车的重量。'

q.en: Who designed the strong iron skeleton inside the Statue of Liberty?
q.zh: 谁设计了自由女神像内部坚固的铁制骨架？

explain.en: The book says: 'The French engineer Gustave Eiffel agreed to help. He created a strong iron skeleton for the statue.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：'法国工程师古斯塔夫·埃菲尔同意帮忙。他为雕像创造了坚固的铁制骨架。'

q.en: What do the seven spikes on the crown of the Statue of Liberty represent?
q.zh: 自由女神像皇冠上的七根尖刺代表什么？

options.en: The seven days of the week
The seven seas and continents of the world
options.zh: 世界的七大洋和七大洲

options.en: The seven original colonies according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 最初的七个殖民地（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book says: 'The crown has seven spikes, which stand for the seven seas and continents of the world.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：'皇冠有七根尖刺，代表世界的七大洋和七大洲。'

q.en: What date is written on the tablet in the statue's left hand?
q.zh: 雕像左手的石碑上写着什么日期？

options.en: July 4, 1789 according to some versions of the story

explain.en: The book says: 'The tablet in the statue's left hand has the date July 4, 1776, written on it. This is the date when the Declaration of Independence was signed.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：'雕像左手的石碑上写着1776年7月4日。这是《独立宣言》签署的日期。'

q.en: In what year was the completed statue finally placed on its pedestal in the United States?
q.zh: 完成的雕像最终是在哪一年安放在美国基座上的？

options.en: 1876 according to some versions of the story

explain.en: The book says: 'The Statue of Liberty was placed on its pedestal in 1886—ten years late!' It was supposed to be given in 1876.
explain.zh: 书中写道：'自由女神像于1886年安放在基座上——晚了十年！'它本应在1876年赠予。

q.en: How was the Statue of Liberty transported to the United States?
q.zh: 自由女神像是如何运到美国的？

options.en: Taken apart into 214 crates and shipped by sea
Rolled on wheels all the way according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 用轮子一路滚过去（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book says the French 'took the statue apart! The pieces were packed into 214 crates and put on a ship to the United States. The ship arrived in 1885.'
explain.zh: 书中说法国人'把雕像拆开！部件被装进214个板条箱，装上船运往美国。船于1885年抵达。'

q.en: Why did the Statue of Liberty change from copper-colored to green?
q.zh: 自由女神像为何从铜色变成了绿色？

options.en: It was painted green on purpose according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 它被特意涂成了绿色（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The air slowly changed its color over time
options.zh: 空气随时间使其慢慢变色

explain.en: The book says the statue 'started out the color of a shiny, new copper penny. The air slowly made it change color. By the 1920s, it had turned green!'
explain.zh: 书中写道：雕像'最初是闪亮的新铜币的颜色。空气使它慢慢变色。到20世纪20年代，它已变成绿色！'

q.en: What famous poem lines are displayed inside the pedestal of the statue?
q.zh: 雕像基座内展示的著名诗句是什么？

options.en: Give me your tired, your poor, Your huddled masses yearning to breathe free
options.zh: 给我你那劳顿贫苦、蜷缩渴望自由呼吸的众生

options.en: Twinkle, twinkle, little star according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 一闪一闪小星星（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: The book says a poem inside the pedestal includes: 'Give me your tired, your poor, Your huddled masses yearning to breathe free.'
explain.zh: 书中说基座内展示的一首诗包含：'给我你那劳顿贫苦、蜷缩渴望自由呼吸的众生。'

q.en: Where do visitors take a ferry to see the Statue of Liberty today?
q.zh: 如今游客乘渡轮去哪里参观自由女神像？

options.en: Only Bedloe's Island as it was first named
options.zh: 仅最初命名的贝德洛岛

explain.en: The book says: 'They take a ferry to the island, which is now called Liberty Island.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：'他们乘渡轮前往现在称为自由岛的小岛。'

prompt.en: The Statue of Liberty is a symbol of friendship and freedom. If you could add a new symbol to the statue, what would it be and what would it represent?
prompt.zh: 自由女神像是友谊与自由的象征。如果你能为雕像添加一个新象征，你会添加什么，它代表什么？

en: Name the new symbol you would add
Connect it to the book's idea of the statue as a symbol of friendship or freedom
zh: 说出你想添加的新象征
将其与书中'雕像作为友谊或自由象征'的理念联系起来
